name: @block-agent/app-memory
description: memory BlockApp: local, zero-dependency notes + user profile with full-text/substring recall and write-injection scan.
$exports_note: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build). Importers use '@block-agent/app-memory/manifest.js'. Shared MemoryStore lives in @block-agent/core/apps/memory_store.js.

blockAgent.summary: 本地零依赖记忆库（全文/子串召回）。
